metadata.description: Local toolset — compare real landed prices (with import tax and shipping) across AliExpress, Mercado Livre, Shopee and Amazon.

plugins.name: magents
plugins.description: Compare the real cost-to-your-door of a product across AliExpress, Mercado Livre, Shopee and Amazon — including Brazilian import tax (Remessa Conforme) and shipping — by driving the live sites with a stealth browser that reuses the user's own logged-in session. Runs locally.
